0_0.name: Radiant Wood & Fire
0_0.traditional: Wood feeds fire — talent in full bloom
0_0.explanation: Your energy surges like spring sap rising. You are quick to act and radiate natural charisma. Others are drawn to your initiative, but you may lack patience for slow processes.
0_0.cure: Channel your drive into one craft until mastery
0_0.shadow: Scattered brilliance — many sparks, little warmth
0_0.label: A
0_0.text: Radiant surge — you act fast and glow with natural charisma. Others are drawn to your initiative.

0_1.name: Fire-Borne Metal
0_1.traditional: Fire refines metal — brilliance through tempering
0_1.explanation: You shine under pressure. Challenges don't discourage you; they reveal your sharp edge. Your intensity can overwhelm those who prefer gentleness.
0_1.cure: Rest before you rust — stillness is also strength
0_1.label: B
0_1.text: Shines under pressure. Challenges reveal your sharp edge. Your intensity can overwhelm gentler souls.

0_2.name: Metal-Parented Water
0_2.traditional: Metal begets water — clarity flows into depth
0_2.explanation: You possess rare analytical depth. Where others see chaos, you perceive structure. Your precision is a gift, but don't let it become emotional distance.
0_2.label: C
0_2.text: Rare analytical depth. Where others see chaos, you perceive structure. Don't let precision become emotional distance.

0_3.name: Water-Nourished Wood
0_3.traditional: Water nourishes wood — growth from wisdom
0_3.explanation: Your creativity feeds on reflection. You need solitude to germinate ideas, then burst forth with original vision. Your rhythm is not everyone's rhythm.
0_3.cure: Share the seedlings before they're perfect trees
0_3.label: D
0_3.text: Creativity feeds on reflection. You need solitude to germinate ideas, then burst forth with original vision.

0_4.name: Earth-Anchored Fire
0_4.traditional: Fire born from earth — grounded radiance
0_4.explanation: You combine warmth with stability. People trust you because you're both welcoming and reliable. Your challenge is allowing yourself to change without feeling unmoored.
0_4.label: E
0_4.text: Warmth meets stability. People trust you because you're both welcoming and reliable. Allow yourself to change.

1_0.name: Wood-Fire Synergy
1_0.traditional: Wood and fire in mutual generation — upward momentum
1_0.explanation: You are naturally lucky in expression. Ideas flow to action to result with unusual fluidity. Beware of assuming this ease will last forever without maintenance.
1_0.shadow: Coasting on talent until momentum fades
1_0.label: A
1_0.text: Naturally lucky in expression. Ideas flow to action to result with unusual fluidity. Don't coast on talent.

1_1.name: Fire-Metal Fusion
1_1.traditional: Fire and metal in tension — forged light
1_1.explanation: You contain contradictions: warm yet sharp, passionate yet critical. This tension makes you fascinating and exhausting — often simultaneously. Integration is your life's work.
1_1.cure: Neither blade nor flame alone — both together
1_1.label: B
1_1.text: Warm yet sharp, passionate yet critical. This contradiction makes you fascinating and exhausting simultaneously.

1_2.name: Metal-Water Circuit
1_2.traditional: Metal and water in flow — lucid current
1_2.explanation: Your mind operates at high frequency with remarkable clarity. You see patterns others miss. The cost: you may intellectualize emotions that need to be felt, not analyzed.
1_2.cure: Sometimes the answer is 'I don't know'
1_2.label: C
1_2.text: High-frequency mind with remarkable clarity. You see patterns others miss. Don't intellectualize emotions that need feeling.

1_3.name: Water-Wood Resonance
1_3.traditional: Water and wood in resonance — deep growth
1_3.explanation: Your intuition and imagination reinforce each other. You sense possibilities before they're visible. Ground these visions in concrete action or they remain beautiful ghosts.
1_3.cure: One real step beats ten imagined journeys
1_3.shadow: Dreams thick as forests, no paths cleared
1_3.label: D
1_3.text: Intuition and imagination reinforce each other. You sense possibilities before they're visible. Ground visions in action.

1_4.name: Fire-Earth Balance
1_4.traditional: Fire and earth in harmony — warm foundation
1_4.explanation: You offer rare combination: inspiration plus follow-through. People rely on you because you deliver. Don't let reliability become invisible martyrdom.
1_4.cure: Being counted on shouldn't mean being drained
1_4.label: E
1_4.text: Rare combo of inspiration plus follow-through. People rely on you because you deliver. Don't become an invisible martyr.

2_0.name: Wood Dominant (Earth Weak)
2_0.traditional: Wood overpowers earth — roots disrupting ground
2_0.explanation: Your willpower exceeds your structural support. You push forward relentlessly, sometimes destabilizing the foundations beneath you. Build before you branch further.
2_0.cure: Deep roots need deep soil — cultivate your base
2_0.label: A
2_0.text: Willpower exceeds structural support. You push forward relentlessly, sometimes destabilizing your foundations. Build before branching.

2_1.name: Fire Dominant (Metal Weak)
2_1.traditional: Fire melts metal — passion dissolving discipline
2_1.explanation: Your intensity overwhelms your boundaries. You give fully and burn hot, but may exhaust your resources faster than you replenish. Structure is not your enemy.
2_1.cure: Containment creates higher pressure, not less power
2_1.label: B
2_1.text: Intensity overwhelms boundaries. You give fully and burn hot, but may exhaust resources faster than you replenish.

2_2.name: Metal Dominant (Wood Weak)
2_2.traditional: Metal chops wood — judgment cutting growth
2_2.explanation: Your standards are so high they become weapons — against others and against yourself. Excellence pursued through criticism produces anxiety, not mastery. Try encouragement as a tool.
2_2.cure: A scarred tree still bears fruit
2_2.label: C
2_2.text: Standards so high they become weapons — against others and yourself. Excellence through criticism produces anxiety, not mastery.

2_3.name: Water Dominant (Fire Weak)
2_3.traditional: Water extinguishes fire — depth drowning spark
2_3.explanation: Your inner world is so rich that outer action feels redundant or shallow. You observe more than you participate. At some point, watching must become doing.
2_3.cure: Heat the water — let one thing matter enough to burn for
2_3.label: D
2_3.text: Inner world so rich that outer action feels redundant. You observe more than participate. At some point, watching must become doing.

2_4.name: Earth/Water Dominant (Fire Weak)
2_4.traditional: Heavy elements smothering fire — weight dimming light
2_4.explanation: Your thoughtfulness becomes inertia. You consider every angle so thoroughly that decision-making grinds to a halt. Imperfect action beats perfect hesitation.
2_4.cure: Move first, correct course while moving
2_4.shadow: The bridge never built because the blueprint wasn't perfect
2_4.label: E
2_4.text: Thoughtfulness becomes inertia. You consider every angle so thoroughly that decision-making grinds to a halt.

3_0.name: Wood Deficient (Metal Strong)
3_0.traditional: Wood weak against strong metal — flexibility versus cutting
3_0.explanation: You feel judged before you begin. External standards (or internalized ones) constrain your natural growth. Your authenticity fights against perceived expectations constantly.
3_0.cure: Grow sideways if upward is blocked — find unconventional paths
3_0.label: A
3_0.text: Feel judged before you begin. External standards constrain your natural growth. Authenticity fights perceived expectations constantly.

3_1.name: Fire Deficient (Water Strong)
3_1.traditional: Fire weak against strong water — spark under flood
3_1.explanation: Your enthusiasm is genuine but fragile. One skeptical look, one practical objection, and your fire shrinks. Protect your ignition source — it's rarer than you think.
3_1.cure: Wet wood still burns — persistence over intensity
3_1.label: B
3_1.text: Enthusiasm is genuine but fragile. One skeptical look and your fire shrinks. Protect your ignition source — it's rarer than you think.

3_2.name: Metal Deficient (Fire Strong)
3_2.traditional: Metal weak against strong fire — melting boundaries
3_2.explanation: You struggle to maintain edges. Saying no, setting limits, defining boundaries — these feel like violence to your nature. But without boundaries, your generosity depletes you.
3_2.cure: A vessel needs walls to hold anything
3_2.label: C
3_2.text: Struggle to maintain edges. Saying no, setting limits — these feel like violence to your nature. Without boundaries, generosity depletes you.

3_3.name: Water Deficient (Earth Strong)
3_3.traditional: Water weak against strong earth — dammed flow
3_3.explanation: Your emotional expression is blocked by duty, logic, or the need to appear composed. You feel deeply but surface calmly — sometimes too calmly. Let something show.
3_3.cure: One crack in the dam releases the whole river
3_3.label: D
3_3.text: Emotional expression blocked by duty or the need to appear composed. You feel deeply but surface calmly — sometimes too calmly.

3_4.name: Earth Deficient (Wood Strong)
3_4.traditional: Earth weak against strong wood — unstable ground
3_4.explanation: Your stability is challenged by constant growth impulses. Just as things settle, a new direction calls. Scattered foundations prevent any structure from reaching its full height.
3_4.cure: Choose one hill, one season, one commitment
3_4.shadow: Forest with no trunk — all branches
3_4.label: E
3_4.text: Stability challenged by constant growth impulses. Scattered foundations prevent any structure from reaching full height.

4_0.name: Pure Wood Manifestation
4_0.traditional: Wood element pure and expressed — vital force unleashed
4_0.explanation: Your nature expresses directly through growth, vision, and forward movement. You are what you seem — authentic energy moving toward expansion. Honor this clarity.
4_0.cure: Flexibility IS your strength — stop trying to be stone
4_0.shadow: Growing in all directions equally = nowhere fast
4_0.label: A
4_0.text: Nature expresses directly through growth, vision, and forward movement. You are what you seem — authentic energy moving toward expansion.

4_1.name: Pure Fire Manifestation
4_1.traditional: Fire element pure and expressed — radiance unfiltered
4_1.explanation: Your nature expresses through warmth, visibility, and inspiration. You light up rooms and illuminate others' paths. Remember: even stars need dark periods to continue shining.
4_1.shadow: Beacon visible from space but cold at base
4_1.label: B
4_1.text: Expresses through warmth, visibility, and inspiration. You light up rooms and illuminate paths. Even stars need dark periods.

4_2.name: Pure Metal Manifestation
4_2.traditional: Metal element pure and expressed — precision embodied
4_2.explanation: Your nature expresses through refinement, justice, and clear structure. You cut through noise to essence. Value this gift even when others call it harshness.
4_2.cure: Reflection serves only when there's something worth reflecting
4_2.label: C
4_2.text: Expresses through refinement, justice, and clear structure. You cut through noise to essence. Value this gift even when others call it harshness.

4_3.name: Pure Water Manifestation
4_3.traditional: Water element pure and expressed — depth flowing freely
4_3.explanation: Your nature expresses through adaptability, wisdom, and intuitive flow. You navigate complexity that paralyzes others. Your depth is your superpower — own it without apology.
4_3.cure: Depth needs container or it disperses into shallows
4_3.label: D
4_3.text: Expresses through adaptability, wisdom, and intuitive flow. You navigate complexity that paralyzes others. Your depth is your superpower.

4_4.name: Pure Earth Manifestation
4_4.traditional: Earth element pure and expressed — center holding firm
4_4.explanation: Your nature expresses through stability, nourishment, and quiet presence. You are the ground others walk on — essential but often unseen. Your stillness is active, not passive.
4_4.cure: The unmoving mountain still shapes weather patterns
4_4.shadow: So stable nothing grows — sterile ground
4_4.label: E
4_4.text: Expresses through stability, nourishment, and quiet presence. You are the ground others walk on — essential but often unseen.

5_0.label: A
5_0.text: "Be there in five min" — don't even change clothes

5_1.label: B
5_1.text: "Who else is going?" — once you know someone, say "save me a spot"

5_2.label: C
5_2.text: "Kinda tired... sure I guess" — hesitate for ages before leaving

5_3.label: D
5_3.text: "Too tired, next time" — did absolutely nothing, just lay on the couch

6_0.label: A
6_0.text: Watch it immediately, then dive down the research rabbit hole until 3 AM

6_1.label: B
6_1.text: Watched it, made sense, saved it, then kept scrolling

6_2.label: C
6_2.text: Swiped past, but next video is same creator, end up watching a few more

6_3.label: D
6_3.text: Read the title, thought "another scam artist," swiped away instantly

7_0.label: A
7_0.text: Research specs, compare reviews, read forum threads for hours, buy something completely different

7_1.label: B
7_1.text: Checked ratings, picked a well-reviewed one, ordered, done

7_2.label: C
7_2.text: Buy cheap version first to test, upgrade later if good

7_3.label: D
7_3.text: Add to cart, hesitate forever, forget about it, or someone gifts you one

8_0.label: A
8_0.text: Read a dozen "zero to hero" guides, research optimal path, hoard tutorials, feel productive without starting

8_1.label: B
8_1.text: Learn the framework and principles first, understand what to study before doing

8_2.label: C
8_2.text: Find a tutorial and follow along. First output is ugly but feels like achievement

8_3.label: D
8_3.text: Bought full equipment and course kit. Still haven't removed the plastic wrap

9_0.label: A
9_0.text: "Wait — how do you make money? Where are users coming from? What's your moat?"

9_1.label: B
9_1.text: "Cool idea, but have you thought about execution?" — validate first, then probe

9_2.label: C
9_2.text: "That's actually interesting — tell me more, let me help you refine it"

9_3.label: D
9_3.text: "OMG that's amazing! When's launch? I'll promote it!" — more excited than them

10_0.label: A
10_0.text: Write a point-by-point rebuttal with cited sources, thorough and rigorous

10_1.label: B
10_1.text: Leave one comment pointing out the issue, too lazy to keep arguing

10_2.label: C
10_2.text: Feels wrong but arguing is pointless, just scroll past

10_3.label: D
10_3.text: Type out a whole essay, delete it all, leave a single emoji

11_0.label: A
11_0.text: "Honestly, this color doesn't match your vibe"

11_1.label: B
11_1.text: "It's unique... but maybe try another color?" — gentle nudge

11_2.label: C
11_2.text: "Wow that's nice! It really suits you!"

11_3.label: D
11_3.text: Post in group chat "look at my friend's new bag" while mourning their wallet inside

12_0.label: A
12_0.text: Organized by function in folders, prime screen real estate for favorites, reorganize every wallpaper change

12_1.label: B
12_1.text: Roughly categorized, but new apps get dumped anywhere, batch-organize later

12_2.label: C
12_2.text: Occasionally do a big cleanup, but it reverts within a week

12_3.label: D
12_3.text: Random placement, find apps via search, sometimes unsure which icon is which

13_0.label: A
13_0.text: Finish day one, review days two and three, revise twice before submitting

13_1.label: B
13_1.text: Make a plan day one, procrastinate slightly, finish night of day two

13_2.label: C
13_2.text: Spend two days thinking "should really start", finally begin day three

13_3.label: D
13_3.text: Completely forget for two days, remember at last minute, submit in panic mode

14_0.label: A
14_0.text: Itinerary precise down to minutes per attraction — arrive to find it closed for renovation

14_1.label: B
14_1.text: Must-see list ready, rough itinerary planned, occasional flexible adjustments

14_2.label: C
14_2.text: Researched beforehand, but after arrival just go wherever the mood takes me

14_3.label: D
14_3.text: Suitcase and go. Sleep wherever. Pure randomness

15_0.label: A
15_0.text: Prioritize, knock them out one by one, check off each completion

15_1.label: B
15_1.text: Work by priority, but mind wanders to other tasks during the first one

15_2.label: C
15_2.text: Set priorities, switch halfway thinking another is more urgent, end up scrambling

15_3.label: D
15_3.text: Open all three, work on whichever inspires you, finish none

16_0.label: A
16_0.text: Order from multiple delivery apps, binge videos till midnight, remember nothing next morning

16_1.label: B
16_1.text: Scroll through every recent chat, overthinking "did I reply wrong there?"

16_2.label: C
16_2.text: Snappy with everyone around you, "can you stop bothering me," irritable over nothing

16_3.label: D
16_3.text: Phone off, ignore everyone, curtains drawn, lie in bed, won't answer door for food

17_0.label: A
17_0.text: Impulsive shopping spree, regret at unboxing

17_1.label: B
17_1.text: Dig up every past memory, even people you haven't contacted in years

17_2.label: C
17_2.text: Try to control everything, dictate how everyone "should" behave

17_3.label: D
17_3.text: Avoid everyone, even closest friends' messages get ignored

18_0.label: A
18_0.text: So exhausted. Give so much, get so little back. Nobody sees me.

18_1.label: B
18_1.text: Brain won't shut up. Overthinking everything but can't act on any of it.

18_2.label: C
18_2.text: I know exactly what to do. Just can't make myself move.

18_3.label: D
18_3.text: Always the one who gives more in relationships, but nobody appreciates it.

18_4.label: E
18_4.text: Can't pinpoint what's wrong. Just feel... nothing matters.

19_0.label: A
19_0.text: Look polished and impressive, but only I know how hard I'm holding it together

19_1.label: B
19_1.text: Look chill and quiet, but my inner monologue is screaming at 800 RPM

19_2.label: C
19_2.text: What I post is who I am. Too tired for personas, no energy to perform

19_3.label: D
19_3.text: Rarely post. I'm a mystery to others, and honestly to myself too

20_0.label: A
20_0.text: Read it immediately, forward to group chat with own analysis, spark another round of discussion

20_1.label: B
20_1.text: Read it all but too lazy to forward. Already processed it mentally, said nothing

20_2.label: C
20_2.text: Saved but didn't read. No need to think that hard. Living my own life > overanalyzing

20_3.label: D
20_3.text: In group chat: "who reads this garbage" — then secretly opened and read two paragraphs

21_0.label: A
21_0.text: Post a chore division chart on the fridge, specify who takes out trash vs dishes

21_1.label: B
21_1.text: Wait until emotions cool, then talk — clearly explain grievances and expectations

21_2.label: C
21_2.text: Cool down first, talk when feelings settle, try to be gentle with their perspective

21_3.label: D
21_3.text: Silently do all the chores yourself, pretend it's fine, fight about the same thing again next month

22_0.label: A
22_0.text: A map — got gear and levels but no clue what the main quest is

22_1.label: B
22_1.text: Speed boots — know where to go but legs won't move

22_2.label: C
22_2.text: Health potion — got everything but status is wrecked, need to rest

22_3.label: D
22_3.text: Summoning scroll — solo dungeon crawling is lonely, need reliable teammates

23_0.label: A
23_0.text: Posting actively within days, more visible than members who've been there for years

23_1.label: B
23_1.text: Someone asks something I know → reply naturally, back to lurking

23_2.label: C
23_2.text: Observe silently for ages, only speak when a topic genuinely fascinates me

23_3.label: D
23_3.text: Full lurker mode. First message is usually helping someone click a link

24_0.label: A
24_0.text: Mid-story, start analyzing causes, pull out underlying logic and connections

24_1.label: B
24_1.text: Mid-story, veer into bigger topics — "this reminds me of..."

24_2.label: C
24_2.text: "That afternoon, in that place, that person said this one thing..." — details first

24_3.label: D
24_3.text: Go off-topic mid-story, forget what I was originally talking about

25_0.label: A
25_0.text: Skip manual, mash buttons randomly, figure out my own way to use it

25_1.label: B
25_1.text: Glance at manual for basics, then experiment freely

25_2.label: C
25_2.text: Read manual cover to cover first, follow instructions step by step

25_3.label: D
25_3.text: Search YouTube for review videos instead — more intuitive than reading

26_0.label: A
26_0.text: Declutter first, toss boxes of stuff, everything gets a designated spot

26_1.label: B
26_1.text: Big items placed, small items boxed for later, labeled "to sort"

26_2.label: C
26_2.text: Vow to stay organized this time,一个月后又恢复猪窝模式 (back to chaos within a month)

26_3.label: D
26_3.text: Everything in boxes, sort at new place. Some boxes still unopened

27_0.label: A
27_0.text: By day five getting restless, frantically making plans — even convenience store meetup works

27_1.label: B
27_1.text: First three days blissful, then start craving company, proactively schedule dinner

27_2.label: C
27_2.text: First two days great, then slightly bored, secretly check social media

27_3.label: D
27_3.text: PURE BLISS. This is heaven. Give me another week!

28_1.label: B
28_1.text: Nothing personal, but I'd privately vouch for them if asked

28_2.label: C
28_2.text: They're annoying, but seeing them get scolded still feels uncomfortable

28_3.label: D
28_3.text: Say "so sad" outwardly, secretly a little pleased inside

29_0.label: A
29_0.text: Build a pros/cons table covering every outcome, let them choose

29_1.label: B
29_1.text: "Tell me specifics," then analyze point by point

29_2.label: C
29_2.text: "If you're asking me, you already know the answer" — help them see clearly

29_3.label: D
29_3.text: Ask about their feelings first — "what do YOU actually want?"

30_0.label: A
30_0.text: Show me already! Can't wait! Sharing with friends immediately!

30_1.label: B
30_1.text: Already drafting share copy, deciding which groups to post in

30_2.label: C
30_2.text: Slightly panicked, want to go back and double-check answers

30_3.label: D
30_3.text: Whatever. Deity reveal is the only part that matters
